case_title: ROBERT L BERNSTEIN VS. DAVID JACOBS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00) SERVED JUN-04-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JACOBS, DAVID

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERNSTEIN, ROBERT L RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACOBS, DAVID $2,607.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,717.00, COURT FINDS EACH PARTY 50% AT FAULT FOR THE ACCIDENT.
